## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? One or two sentences. -->

## Related issue

<!-- Link to the issue this PR addresses, if any. Use "Closes #123" syntax to auto-close on merge. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Internal refactor

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this change? List test names, manual steps, or attach output. -->

- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] `ruff check` clean
- [ ] `ruff format --check` clean
- [ ] `mypy src` clean
- [ ] New tests added for new behavior, or rationale given

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] My commits are signed off under the Developer Certificate of Origin (`git commit -s`).
- [ ] I am submitting this contribution under the project's Apache-2.0 license.
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` under the unreleased section, if the change is user-visible.
- [ ] I have updated documentation, if behavior changed.
